sources: Web searches across Houston, DFW, Austin, San Antonio, Coastal, Hill Country, East TX metros
Texas Department of Licensing & Regulation references (TICL, RAIC, RAIL license numbers where disclosed)
IPSSA Tarrant County chapter officer roster (ipssatc.org/officers)
Community Impact / BBB / Yelp / Houzz public profile cross-checks
_meta.exclusion_filter: Excluded national/PE-backed chains: Patriot Pool & Spa, ePoolPro, USA Pool Services, Premier Pool Service, BluPool, Leslie's, Pinch A Penny corporate, The Pool Doctor (chain), ASP/America's Swimming Pool Co franchise locations, Poolwerx (international franchise), SPS PoolCare aggregator brands, BlueScience (regional chain).
_meta.verification_method: Each entry has a verifiable working website URL and matches at least one of: (a) explicit family-owned/locally-owned statement on home or about page, (b) Texas operating address, (c) TX state license number disclosed (TICL/RAIC/RAIL/TDLR). Where founder/year not disclosed publicly, fields are nulled rather than fabricated.
notes: Service mix and truck count are estimates where derivable from public site copy; null when unknown.

All TPCL fields are null because TX pool service operators commonly do NOT hold a Texas Pesticide Applicator License (chlorine/bromine sanitization is exempt from TPCL when used per label for pool sanitation). Operators do typically hold TDLR TICL (Pool Service License) or RAIC/RAIL for equipment install — those are captured in license_number where disclosed.
Geographic distribution skewed Houston/DFW/Austin/San Antonio per priority order in brief.
Two PHTA-eligible chain franchisees were excluded after independence check (Poolwerx Flower Mound, ASP Sugar Land/Galveston/Longview, Pool Troopers Flower Mound).
Easy Pools, Inc flagged as employee-owned, not family-owned — still independent and route-based; included with note.
